Main website now opens the live chat room.
Marks and detailed info are temporarily hidden. Contact jecrc@jecrcfoundation.live or drop a chat request.
Student photos in chat use the same record-mapped image logic as the main portal.
Portal access is still available separately so the old setup can be restored later.
Main website now opens the live chat room.
Marks and detailed info are temporarily hidden. Contact jecrc@jecrcfoundation.live or drop a chat request.
Student photos in chat use the same record-mapped image logic as the main portal.
Portal access is still available separately so the old setup can be restored later.
PortalFull ResultsProfileTracking
Live room on the homepage

Student requests, updates, and support now happen right here.

The main website now opens the live chat directly. Results stay separated under the portal, and detailed marks or student info are temporarily hidden until access is requested.

Live People
0

Students and admins online now.

Messages
0

Conversation history in the room.

Need Records
Request in chat or by mail

jecrc@jecrcfoundation.live

Always Running Notice

Marks and info are hidden for now.

If anyone wants to see anything, kindly drop a mail to jecrc@jecrcfoundation.live or post a request in this chat room.

Where The Full Website Is

The old full results experience is preserved separately so you can switch back later whenever you want.
